title: Charred Dense Moroccan Melons Khlea
description: A comforting, vegan-friendly Moroccan dish featuring charred melons and fermented ingredients. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Cut the cantaloupe into 1-inch cubes and place in a large bowl.
Add 1/4 cup of bottled ginger beer to the bowl and toss to coat.
Transfer the melon to the preheated grill and cook for 10-12 minutes per side, or until nicely charred.
Transfer the melon to a serving dish and stir in 2 tablespoons of olive oil and 1 tablespoon of chopped fresh parsley.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
Serve with a side of crusty bread or over couscous.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
